title: TC001-Publish a Multiple Choice homework and verify share link leads to student view
description: Creates and publishes a Multiple Choice homework through the wizard and verifies the student link opens and shows the homework title.
code:
import asyncio

from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode

        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)

        # -> الضغط على زر 'تسجيل الدخول' لفتح صفحة الدخول.
